languages.text: {n}Собеседник отвечает вам долгим молчанием. Кажется, эльдары не спешат делиться с вами своими секретами.{/n}
{n}Your companion responds with a long silence. The Aeldari do not seem to be in a hurry to share their secrets with you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Собеседник отвечает вам долгим молчанием. Кажется, эльдары не спешат делиться с вами своими секретами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your companion responds with a long silence. The Aeldari do not seem to be in a hurry to share their secrets with you.{/n}
{n}Your companion responds with a long silence. The Aeldari do not seem to be in a hurry to share their secrets with you.{/n}
{n}Your companion responds with a long silence. The Aeldari do not seem to be in a hurry to share their secrets with you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの相棒は長い沈黙で答える。アエルダリはあなたに秘密を共有するのに急いでいないようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your companion responds with a long silence. The Aeldari do not seem to be in a hurry to share their secrets with you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの相棒は長い沈黙で答える。アエルダリはあなたに秘密を共有するのに急いでいないようだ。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu interlocutor solo responde con el silencio. Los Aeldari no parecen dispuestos a compartir sus secretos contigo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your companion responds with a long silence. The Aeldari do not seem to be in a hurry to share their secrets with you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu interlocutor solo responde con el silencio. Los Aeldari no parecen dispuestos a compartir sus secretos contigo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的同伴回应以长久的沉默。看来，艾达灵族并不急于分享他们的秘密。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your companion responds with a long silence. The Aeldari do not seem to be in a hurry to share their secrets with you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的同伴回应以长久的沉默。看来，艾达灵族并不急于分享他们的秘密。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dein Gefährte antwortet mit einem langen Schweigen. Der Aeldari scheint es nicht eilig zu haben, seine Geheimnisse mit dir zu teilen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your companion responds with a long silence. The Aeldari do not seem to be in a hurry to share their secrets with you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dein Gefährte antwortet mit einem langen Schweigen. Der Aeldari scheint es nicht eilig zu haben, seine Geheimnisse mit dir zu teilen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Muhatabın, uzun bir sessizlikle karşılık veriyor. Aeldari, sırlarını seninle paylaşmakta pek aceleci görünmüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your companion responds with a long silence. The Aeldari do not seem to be in a hurry to share their secrets with you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Muhatabın, uzun bir sessizlikle karşılık veriyor. Aeldari, sırlarını seninle paylaşmakta pek aceleci görünmüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seul le silence vous répond. Les Aeldaris ne semblent pas avoir la moindre intention de partager leurs secrets avec vous.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your companion responds with a long silence. The Aeldari do not seem to be in a hurry to share their secrets with you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seul le silence vous répond. Les Aeldaris ne semblent pas avoir la moindre intention de partager leurs secrets avec vous.{/n}
